title: Lotus neglecta
intro: Lotus neglecta, also known as the Chinese lotus or Asian lotus, is a species of aquatic plant that belongs to the Nelumbo genus. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of fever and coughs. The bioactive constituents of Lotus neglecta include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. In traditional Chinese medicine, Lotus neglecta is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, or added to tea blends to promote relaxation, improve digestion, and support overall well-being.
